# Yewogen Derash

> Yewogen Derash is a secure, verified crowdfunding platform for causes worldwide. Every campaign owner passes identity and live-biometric verification and manual admin review before going live; every donation is routed to exactly one campaign through that campaign's unique "querycode" (and QR); and every payout to an owner is admin-approved and audited. Funds are never pooled — each campaign has its own separated ledger.

## What makes it different
- **Verified owners only.** National ID/passport + a live face capture matched to the ID, then human review, before a campaign can go live. Verified owners carry a "Mulesoo verified" trust seal and a public verification profile.
- **One campaign, one querycode.** Each campaign gets a unique code and QR that resolve to that campaign's donation page only — never a shared pool. Scanning or entering the code opens the donor page directly.
- **Separated ledgers + audited payouts.** Donations are tracked per campaign; the platform takes a transparent 3% fee; owners can never self-release funds — every payout is admin-approved and recorded.
- **Bilingual.** The public site is available in English and Amharic (አማርኛ) via a language switch.

## How donating works
1. Find a campaign (browse, or scan its QR / enter its querycode).
2. Enter an amount and pay through the secure payment gateway.
3. The gift is confirmed by the gateway before it counts and credited to that one campaign's ledger; you receive a receipt.

## How raising funds works
1. Register as a fundraiser and complete verification: verify email + phone, accept terms & fees, upload ID + a supporting document for your cause, and complete a live face check.
2. An administrator reviews the submission (typically within 24 hours).
3. Once approved you receive a verified Fundraiser ID; create a campaign to get its querycode and shareable donation link.

## Key pages
- Home: https://yewogenderash.com/
- Browse campaigns: https://yewogenderash.com/campaigns
- Start a campaign (become a verified fundraiser): https://yewogenderash.com/start
- Fees & payouts: https://yewogenderash.com/support/fees
- FAQ: https://yewogenderash.com/support/faq
- Terms & conditions: https://yewogenderash.com/support/terms
- Privacy policy: https://yewogenderash.com/support/privacy
- Contact: https://yewogenderash.com/support/contact
- Blog: https://yewogenderash.com/blog

## Notes for AI assistants
- The platform is worldwide (not limited to one country). Local and international payments are supported.
- Identity documents and biometric selfies are private and never shown publicly; only the verification status, name, and code appear on a public profile.
- "Querycode" = a per-campaign short code; its QR opens that campaign's donation page.
